name: Adalimumab (Humira) 40 mg/0.8 mL subcutaneous injection
requestedFor: Moderate-to-severe rheumatoid arthritis in an adult with documented failure of methotrexate (hepatotoxicity) and leflunomide (peripheral neuropathy), and medical contraindication to sulfasalazine (sulfa allergy); TNF-inhibitor initiation per step-therapy exception
